text: All right, game one. Astros took a five nothing lead on two Kyle Tucker homers. Phillies came back. Future Hall of Famer JT Realmuto, yes, I'm calling that, breaks the tie. Phillies seal the game. Nick Castellanos taunts the crowd by ripping up his shirt, which was kind of a vibe. Game two. Astros go up five nothing and actually hold the lead. Game three. Bryce Harper is so him. Phillies win by a touchdown. Game four. Astros pitch a f*cking no hitter. That's it. Game five. Meek Mill performed. Jeremy Peña dominated at the plate, and Chaz McCormick made an unreal catch to save the game. Game six. Kyle Schwarber hit one of his many nukes while Yordan Alvarez sealed it on one swing, as he's done before. Astros in six.
